promptDescription: - **attackpath** — interactive force-directed attack-path graph for security kill chains: entry point → pivots → crown jewel. Color-codes assets by type, highlights named attack paths in red, glows critical/chokepoint nodes. Click a path in the sidebar to highlight it; drag nodes; scroll to zoom. Best for lateral movement, MITRE ATT&CK chains, cloud/network compromise paths. Spec: { "type":"attackpath", "title":"Web to DB Kill Chain", "nodes":[{"id":"internet","name":"Internet","type":"entry","is_source":true},{"id":"web","name":"Web Server","type":"host"},{"id":"db","name":"Database","type":"database","is_sink":true,"critical":true}], "links":[{"source":"internet","target":"web","label":"exploit","technique":"T1190","stepType":"exploit"},{"source":"web","target":"db","label":"SQLi","technique":"T1505","stepType":"lateral"}], "paths":[{"label":"Path 1","severity":"Critical","path_nodes":["internet","web","db"]}], "critical_nodes":["db"] }. Node types: entry, host, pivot, identity, cloud, service, database, secret, role, crownJewel. stepType on links: exploit, lateral, escalation, misconfiguration, credential.

exampleSpec.title: External Web to Database Kill Chain

renderScript:
function(wrap,spec){if(!wrap.style.height)wrap.style.height='520px';var NC={entry:'#E74C3C',entryPoint:'#E74C3C',host:'#4A90D9',pivot:'#E8833A',identity:'#9B59B6',cloud:'#3498DB',service:'#2ECC71',database:'#C0392B',secret:'#E74C3C',role:'#8E44AD',crownJewel:'#FFD700',pod:'#4A90D9',serviceaccount:'#E8833A'};var SC={exploit:'#E74C3C',lateral:'#E8833A',escalation:'#9B59B6',misconfiguration:'#F39C12',credential:'#3498DB'};var AP='#ff4757';var CR='#FFD700';function load(url,cb){for(var i=0;i'+(spec.title||'Attack Paths')+'';var pathList=document.createElement('div');sidebar.appendChild(pathList);wrap.appendChild(sidebar);var gwrap=document.createElement('div');gwrap.className='ap-graph';wrap.appendChild(gwrap);var tip=document.createElement('div');tip.className='ap-tip';gwrap.appendChild(tip);paths.forEach(function(p,idx){var card=document.createElement('div');card.className='ap-card';var sev=(p.severity||'Medium');var names=(p.path_names||p.path_nodes||[]).join(' → ');card.innerHTML=''+sev+''+(p.label||('Path '+(idx+1)))+'
'+names+'
';card.onclick=function(){var active=card.classList.contains('active');pathList.querySelectorAll('.ap-card').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('active');});if(active){activeIdx=null;clearHL();return;}activeIdx=idx;card.classList.add('active');highlightPath(paths[idx]);};pathList.appendChild(card);});if(!paths.length)pathList.innerHTML='
No named paths — all links shown.
';var activeIdx=null;function clearHL(){d3.select(gwrap).selectAll('.ap-node,.ap-label,.ap-link').classed('dim',false);}function highlightPath(p){var ns=new Set((p.path_nodes||[]).map(String));var es=new Set();var seq=p.path_nodes||[];for(var i=0;i'+(d.name||d.id)+'
Type: '+(d.type||'?')+(d.risk!=null?'
Risk: '+d.risk:'')+(roles.length?'
'+roles.join(', '):'');}).on('mousemove',function(ev){tip.style.left=(ev.offsetX+12)+'px';tip.style.top=(ev.offsetY+12)+'px';}).on('mouseout',function(){tip.style.display='none';}).on('click',function(ev,d){ev.stopPropagation();var reach=bfs(d.id);d3.select(gwrap).selectAll('.ap-node').classed('dim',function(n){return!reach.has(n.id);});d3.select(gwrap).selectAll('.ap-label').classed('dim',function(n){return!reach.has(n.id);});});labelG.selectAll('text').data(nodes).enter().append('text').attr('class','ap-label').attr('dy',function(d){return nodeR(d)+12;}).text(function(d){return d.name||d.id;});function bfs(start){var vis=new Set([start]);var q=[start];var adj={};links.forEach(function(l){var s=typeof l.source==='object'?l.source.id:l.source;var t=typeof l.target==='object'?l.target.id:l.target;if(!adj[s])adj[s]=[];adj[s].push(t);});while(q.length){var c=q.shift();(adj[c]||[]).forEach(function(n){if(!vis.has(n)){vis.add(n);q.push(n);}});}return vis;}sim.on('tick',function(){linkSel.attr('x1',function(d){return d.source.x;}).attr('y1',function(d){return d.source.y;}).attr('x2',function(d){return d.target.x;}).attr('y2',function(d){return d.target.y;});circles.attr('cx',function(d){return d.x;}).attr('cy',function(d){return d.y;});labelG.selectAll('text').attr('x',function(d){return d.x;}).attr('y',function(d){return d.y;});});if(paths.length){pathList.querySelector('.ap-card').click();}});}
